dungeon: GENUINE ROTF CHRISTMAS/HOLIDAY EVENT compilation (~420s, 28 dungeon entries; reindeer-named players Dancer/Comet/Dasher/Prancer + 'Happy Holidays'). Structured as an '8-DUNGEON CHALLENGE' (a prominent X/8 counter climbs 0/8 -> 8/8 as dungeons are cleared). HIGH value: multi-boss taunt haul — 2 unbuilt build-candidates with taunts (Nikad full set; The Forgotten King) + CONFIRMATION of built Twilight Archmage / Troll Matriarch / Marble Colossus lines + documented event mechanics.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-frames+transitions: an 8-dungeon TOUR (no single layout) — biomes cleared in sequence include SNOWY/ICE arenas, RED/LAVA arenas, ORANGE/sandy grids, GREEN grass realms, COLORFUL-tiled rooms, and BROWN dirt rooms. Each is a self-contained boss arena entered via portal; the X/8 challenge counter + 'Current number of the remaining enemies <N>' track clear progress. Crowded public-event arenas.

I have l[ost]...'. The first 3 lines read complete.

bosses.name: Marble Colossus
attacks: DOCUMENTED-from-frames (b022_183s, lava arena): an ORANGE radial RING-NOVA / curved arc of bullets from center (red/lava arena).
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (boss-prefix 'Marble Colossus'). ALREADY BUILT. CORROBORATION: 'I feel my[self... slipping]...' matches the built crumbling line. (b022 lava-arena orange radial-nova attack may belong to a different lava boss in this multi-dungeon tour, not necessarily Marble Colossus -> attack attribution uncertain.)

drops: Event Chest / 'The Reward Chest has spawned!' (public-event reward chest)
Potion of Speed / Potion of Life Consumed (potion use)
mechanics: DOCUMENTED ROTF SYSTEMS: (1) an '8-DUNGEON CHALLENGE' — a persistent X/8 counter climbs 0/8 -> 8/8 as dungeons are cleared (distinct from the /3, /30, /25, /150 event counters; this is a clear-8-dungeons quest). (2) 'Current number of the remaining enemies <N>' — a per-arena remaining-enemy COUNTDOWN. (3) 'Event Chest - The Reward Chest has spawned!' shared reward chest. (4) '8 MIN SHATTS' — a Shatters dungeon 8-minute event timer. (5) boss ATTACK-TELEGRAPH lines ('3 seconds until the next attack!'). (6) CHRISTMAS/HOLIDAY event (reindeer player names Dancer/Comet/Dasher/Prancer + 'Happy Holidays'). (7) a '20/20' indicator (maxed quest/stat). Bracket-prefixed boss speech (server convention).
uncertain: Crowded multi-dungeon HOLIDAY compilation -> ATTACK geometry mostly NOT isolatable (only b022's orange radial-nova in a lava arena is clean, and its boss attribution is uncertain in a multi-dungeon tour). Several taunts tail-CUT (Nikad 'full power of...' + 'I have l...'; Forgotten King 'and...'; Marble Colossus 'I feel my...') -> partial, verify tails. Twilight Archmage 'Darkness give me strength!' + 'I... will... retuuurrnnn...' read clean (the former confirms a prior cut lead). Troll Matriarch + Marble Colossus lines are CORROBORATION of built bosses. Nikad + Forgotten King are unbuilt -> consolidate with prior specs (Forgotten King has 14) before building.
confidence: HIGH (taunt IDs + corroboration) / LOW (attack geometry, crowd-obscured). GENUINE ROTF holiday event. Best finds: (a) NIKAD full taunt set (unbuilt -> build candidate w/ minion-summoner gimmick); (b) THE FORGOTTEN KING (14 specs, unbuilt -> strong candidate); (c) AUDIT WINS — confirms built Troll Matriarch (validates recent enrich) + Marble Colossus lines, and confirms Twilight Archmage 'Darkness give me strength!' (full form of a prior cut lead) + a NEW death line 'I... will... return...'. Recorded honestly: built-vs-unbuilt separated, cuts flagged, attacks DOCUMENTED-vs-reconstructed, attack attribution uncertainty noted, no fabrication. Best follow-up: ENRICH Twilight Archmage with the 2 confirmed lines; build Nikad + Forgotten King (consolidate prior specs).
